global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent call to action and brand logo.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for the CloudRoute app.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A light green rectangular area at the top of the ad, providing a soft backdrop.

elements.label: Main app interface
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center displaying a simplified app interface with rounded shapes.

elements.label: Secondary text
elements.description: Text in a bold font, positioned centrally, conveying additional information about the app.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: An abstract shape in the center, possibly a placeholder for an image or graphic.

elements.label: Highlighted text
elements.description: Text in a prominent position, emphasizing a key feature or benefit of the app.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A rounded shape in the center, adding visual interest without specific context.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A bold, attention-grabbing text at the bottom urging users to install the app, with a price highlighted.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Special fares today €29.92 Install now

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the brand name 'CloudRoute' in a clear font.
